title: • Real-time synchronization of music and visuals.
content:
• Real-time synchronization of music and visuals.
  • Secure contextual awareness relay with encryption and access control.
  • Weighted audience voting protocol for live performance influence.
  • Dev/test environments simulating touring workflows.
  • Delivery of a functional audience-interactive prototype.

    • Out of Scope

    • Global-scale audience applications.
    • Optimization for festival-scale audiences beyond the prototype.
    • Licensing of commercial music and visual assets.

    ---

    4. Project Schedule (High-Level)


    • Planning (Weeks 1–4)
    • Draft Contextual Awareness Subsystem specification.
    • Document data channels, triggers, and integration points.

    • Security (Weeks 5–6)
    • Audit live performance data flow.
    • Implement encryption and relay integrity tests.

    • Design (Weeks 7–10)
    • Architect interaction environment and audience protocols.
    • Define streaming/touring configurations and modular scalability.
context: From document: Project Charter: Contextual Awareness and Audience-Interactive Live… — chunk 3 (chunk 3/15)
